metadata.title: IntelWatch ETIP - Threat Intelligence Platform
metadata.description: Integrates IntelWatch ETIP threat intelligence with Microsoft Sentinel for automated IOC ingestion, detection, and hunting.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace
Your ETIP API key (starts with etip_)

properties.serializedData: See workbook/etip-workbook.json — inline during solution packaging

properties.description: Detects when a high-confidence (>=80) IOC from IntelWatch ETIP matches network, DNS, or security event logs.
properties.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where ConfidenceScore >= 80
| where Active == true
| join kind=inner (
    union
    (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h) | extend MatchValue = DestinationIP),
    (DnsEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h) | extend MatchValue = Name),
    (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h) | extend MatchValue = IpAddress)
) on $left.NetworkIP == $right.MatchValue
| project TimeGenerated, IndicatorValue = NetworkIP, ConfidenceScore, ThreatSeverity, Computer, MatchValue, SourceSystem

properties.description: Detects DNS queries to domains tagged as C2 infrastructure in IntelWatch ETIP.
properties.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where Active == true
| where Tags has "c2"
| where isnotempty(DomainName)
| join kind=inner (
    DnsEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(15m)
) on $left.DomainName == $right.Name
| project TimeGenerated, C2Domain = DomainName, ClientIP, Computer, ConfidenceScore, Tags

properties.displayName: New Critical Severity IOC Ingested from ETIP
properties.description: Alerts when new critical-severity IOCs are ingested from IntelWatch ETIP.
properties.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| where ThreatSeverity =~ "critical"
| where Active == true
| project TimeGenerated, ExternalIndicatorId, IndicatorValue = coalesce(NetworkIP, DomainName, Url, FileHashValue, EmailSenderAddress), ThreatSeverity, ConfidenceScore, Tags, Description

properties.displayName: Multiple ETIP IOC Matches on Same Host
properties.description: 3+ distinct ETIP IOCs matched on the same host within 24 hours.
properties.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where Active == true
| join kind=inner (
    union
    (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h) | project Computer, MatchValue = DestinationIP, TimeGenerated),
    (DnsEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h) | project Computer, MatchValue = Name, TimeGenerated),
    (SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h) | project Computer, MatchValue = IpAddress, TimeGenerated)
) on $left.NetworkIP == $right.MatchValue
| summarize DistinctIOCs = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId), IOCValues = make_set(NetworkIP, 10), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated1), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated1) by Computer
| where DistinctIOCs >= 3

properties.description: No new IOCs from IntelWatch ETIP for over 2 hours.
properties.query:
ETIP_Stats_CL
| top 1 by TimeGenerated
| where TimeGenerated < ago(2h)
| extend StalenessHours = datetime_diff('hour', now(), TimeGenerated)
| project TimeGenerated, StalenessHours, Status = "Feed sync is stale"

ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where ConfidenceScore >= 85 and Active == true
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(30d)
| join kind=leftanti (SecurityAlert | where TimeGenerated >= ago(30d) | mv-expand todynamic(Entities) | extend AlertIndicator = tostring(Entities.Address)) on $left.NetworkIP == $right.AlertIndicator
| project ExternalIndicatorId, IndicatorType = case(isnotempty(NetworkIP), "IP", isnotempty(DomainName), "Domain", isnotempty(Url), "URL", isnotempty(FileHashValue), "Hash", "Other"), IndicatorValue = coalesce(NetworkIP, DomainName, Url, FileHashValue, EmailSenderAddress), ConfidenceScore, ThreatSeverity, Tags
| order by ConfidenceScore desc

properties.displayName: Network Activity Matching ETIP Threat Actor IOCs
properties.query:
let threatActorIOCs = ThreatIntelligenceIndicator | where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP" and Active == true | where Description has "threatActors" | project NetworkIP, DomainName, ExternalIndicatorId, ConfidenceScore;
union (threatActorIOCs | where isnotempty(NetworkIP) | join kind=inner (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d) | project TimeGenerated, DestinationIP, Computer, DeviceAction) on $left.NetworkIP == $right.DestinationIP | project TimeGenerated, MatchType="IP", MatchedValue=NetworkIP, Computer, ConfidenceScore), (threatActorIOCs | where isnotempty(DomainName) | join kind=inner (DnsEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d) | project TimeGenerated, Name, Computer) on $left.DomainName == $right.Name | project TimeGenerated, MatchType="Domain", MatchedValue=DomainName, Computer, ConfidenceScore) | order by TimeGenerated desc

properties.displayName: Endpoints Communicating with New Malware Family IOCs
properties.query:
let recentMalwareIOCs = ThreatIntelligenceIndicator | where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP" | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d) and Active == true | where Description has "malwareFamilies" | project NetworkIP, DomainName, ExternalIndicatorId, ConfidenceScore;
union (recentMalwareIOCs | where isnotempty(NetworkIP) | join kind=inner (CommonSecurityLog | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d) | project TimeGenerated, DestinationIP, Computer, DeviceProduct) on $left.NetworkIP == $right.DestinationIP | project TimeGenerated, IOCType="IP", IOCValue=NetworkIP, Computer, DeviceProduct, ConfidenceScore), (recentMalwareIOCs | where isnotempty(DomainName) | join kind=inner (DnsEvents | where TimeGenerated >= ago(7d) | project TimeGenerated, Name, Computer) on $left.DomainName == $right.Name | project TimeGenerated, IOCType="Domain", IOCValue=DomainName, Computer, DeviceProduct="DNS", ConfidenceScore) | order by ConfidenceScore desc

properties.displayName: Internal Hosts Matching ETIP Lateral Movement Indicators
properties.query:
let lateralIOCs = ThreatIntelligenceIndicator | where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP" and Active == true | where KillChainActions has "T1021" or KillChainActions has "T1570" or KillChainActions has "T1563" | project NetworkIP, ExternalIndicatorId, ConfidenceScore, KillChainActions;
SecurityEvent | where TimeGenerated >= ago(14d) | where EventID in (4624, 4625, 4648) and LogonType in (3, 10) | join kind=inner (lateralIOCs | where isnotempty(NetworkIP)) on $left.IpAddress == $right.NetworkIP | summarize LoginAttempts=count(), DistinctTargets=dcount(Computer), FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by IpAddress, Account, KillChainActions | where LoginAttempts >= 2 | order by LoginAttempts desc
